introSection: Batflyer  was a steel suspended single rail kiddie roller coaster located at World in Miniature in Truro, Cornwall, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Batflyer and Zyklen were scheduled to open at Lightwater Valley in Easter but this was pushed back due to delays in receiving planning permission. It opened later in 1996.

fullText:
Batflyer  was a steel suspended single rail kiddie roller coaster located at World in Miniature in Truro, Cornwall, England, UK.

Batflyer and Zyklen were scheduled to open at Lightwater Valley in Easter but this was pushed back due to delays in receiving planning permission. It opened later in 1996.



Black track and supports
